label: AppleScript • scripted error recovery (runtime error then fix)
query: Set the body of the note 'Draft' to 'Fixed'.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the real-error feedback loop. The mock returns a genuine runtime error for the first script and success for the corrected retry (per-step canned results, no coercion). Proves the loop feeds the real error back and continues; the aggregate is honestly 'partial' (one failed script, one succeeded). No tokens.

scriptedCalls: {"script":"tell application \"Notes\" to set body of note \"Draft\" to \"Fixed\""}
